notableEvents.label: Andy Pages GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Kyle Tucker out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Max Muncy. Ramón Laureano to 3rd. Ramón Laureano advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by third baseman Max Muncy.
